description: Business-to-business enquiries from hotels, gyms, and companies needing recurring laundry services.

scenarios.customer_message: We run a hotel and need a regular laundry partner for our linens.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Thanks for your interest! Could you share your business name, location, and estimated weekly volume so our team can follow up?

scenarios.customer_message: Our gym needs daily towel cleaning, can you handle bulk orders?
scenarios.expected_short_reply: We'd be glad to explore this. Could you share your business name, location, and weekly volume so our team can reach out?

scenarios.customer_message: I manage an office and want to set up a corporate laundry contract.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Great to hear! Please share your business name, location, and expected weekly volume so our team can follow up with details.

scenarios.customer_message: Our restaurant chain needs uniform cleaning across several branches.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Could you share your business name, locations, and weekly volume so our team can assist?
